summary: email-validator is a lightweight JavaScript library for email address syntax validation (no DNS verification), providing isValidEmail and parseEmail functions. The README describes a Jest test suite in detail, but the tree contains no test files — tests were removed and documentation was not updated. package.json lists jest as a dev dependency and declares a test script, but with no *.test.*, *.spec.*, or __tests__/ files present, the test command is unsupported.

entrypoints.description: Library main module exporting isValidEmail and parseEmail; package.json main and exports point here

key_directories.role: library source: validation logic and TypeScript type definitions
